metadata.title: Free Online Tools — Atlas Studio
metadata.description: Free online tools for developers and designers. QR code generator, image converter, background remover, JSON formatter and more.

home.hero_title: Powerful tools, right in your browser
home.hero_subtitle: Convert, compress, generate — all without a server, no sign-up, completely free.
home.privacy_description: All tools run directly in your browser. No files are uploaded to any server.
home.no_signup_description: Use every tool instantly — no account, no email, no registration.
home.instant_description: Everything runs client-side. Get results in milliseconds, not minutes.
home.cta_description: Atlas Studio builds web apps, mobile apps, and cloud solutions.

tools.title: All Tools
tools.subtitle: Choose a tool to get started

qr-code-generator.name: QR Code Generator
qr-code-generator.description: Generate QR codes from text or URLs. Download as PNG or SVG.

image-converter.name: Image Converter
image-converter.description: Convert images between JPG, PNG, WebP, ICO and AVIF formats.
image-converter.unsupported_avif: AVIF is not supported in your browser. Please use Chrome or Edge.

image-compressor.name: Image Compressor
image-compressor.description: Reduce image file sizes while maintaining quality.

background-remover.name: Background Remover
background-remover.description: Remove image backgrounds automatically with AI — right in your browser.
background-remover.max_size_warning: For best results, use images under 10MB

color-picker.name: Color Picker
color-picker.description: Pick colors, generate palettes, copy in HEX/RGB/HSL formats.

base64-encoder.name: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
base64-encoder.description: Encode and decode text and files to and from Base64.
base64-encoder.input_placeholder: Enter text to encode or decode...

json-formatter.name: JSON Formatter
json-formatter.description: Format, validate and minify JSON directly in your browser.

lorem-ipsum-generator.name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
lorem-ipsum-generator.description: Generate placeholder text in Latin or Albanian.

password-generator.name: Password Generator
password-generator.description: Generate secure, random passwords with customizable rules.

word-counter.name: Word Counter
word-counter.description: Count words, characters, sentences and paragraphs in your text.
word-counter.placeholder: Start typing or paste your text here...

css-gradient-generator.name: CSS Gradient Generator
css-gradient-generator.description: Create beautiful CSS gradients with a visual editor.

markdown-preview.name: Markdown Preview
markdown-preview.description: Write Markdown and see it rendered in real time.
markdown-preview.placeholder:
# Hello World

Start writing Markdown here...

url-encoder.name: URL Encoder / Decoder
url-encoder.description: Encode and decode URLs and query parameters.

timestamp-converter.name: Timestamp Converter
timestamp-converter.description: Convert between Unix timestamps, ISO 8601, and human-readable dates.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question or want to work together? Get in touch.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success_message: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you soon.

common.upload_hint: Drag & drop here or click to upload
common.privacy_note: Everything is processed in your browser. No files are sent to any server.

footer.tagline: Free online tools by Atlas Studio

cookieConsent.title: Cookie Notice
cookieConsent.message: We use analytics cookies to understand how you use our tools and improve your experience. No personal data is sold or shared.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
